message:
feat(FJ-P2C-006-F): differential oracle + metamorphic + adversarial tests

15 conformance tests for backend bridge: 5 oracle (CPU eval_jaxpr parity
across all program specs, discovery verification, dtype support), 4
metamorphic (device-count independence, transfer identity, transfer
chain preservation, capability reflection), 6 adversarial (unsupported
backend, nonexistent device alloc/transfer, zero-size buffer, empty
registry, fallback routing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
